title: borbonia multiflora
intro: Borbonia multiflora, also known as the False Ash or Borbonia, is a flowering plant native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, coughs, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Borbonia multiflora include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and prevent infection. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and can also be used in herbal remedies such as tinctures and salves.
